arts.ttl: Oxford hit back to hold Cardiff in Ramsey's first game in charge
arts.sum: Cardiff suffered a huge blow to their survival hopes as a free-kick screamer from Cameron Brannagan salvaged a 1-1 draw for Oxford and soured Aaron Ramsey's first game as Bluebirds boss.

arts.ttl: Cameron Brannagan thunderbolt rescues point for U’s in crunch clash
arts.sum: A TRADEMARK thunderbolt from Cameron Brannagan rescued a point for Oxford United in their crunch clash at Cardiff City.

arts.ttl: Cameron Brannagan free-kick boosts Oxford and hits Cardiff’s survival hopes
arts.sum: Results elsewhere have put the Bluebirds in real relegation peril with two games of the season left.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City 1-1 Oxford United: Bluebirds' survival hopes evaporate after Brannagan stunner in Ramsey's first game
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey took charge of his first game as Bluebirds boss as they drew 1-1 with Oxford United at Cardiff City Stadium

arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Oxford United LIVE: Updates as Aaron Ramsey takes charge of crucial clash
